hero.title: Datenpunk
hero.tagline: Numbers and stories. Usually at the same time.

home.aboutTeaser: Too punk for public office, too story-driven for academia, too nerdy for the executive floor.

projects.title: Open MicZH
projects.teaser: A first Cursor project to visualise open-mic comedy events in Zurich.

project1.title: Test1
project1.intro: A prototype project to test Cursor as a development environment. MicZH collects recurring open-mic dates in Zurich from multiple sources and presents them visually with filters.
project1.imageAlt: Graphic for the Open MicZH project

impressumPage.title: Legal notice
impressumPage.liabilityBody: The contents of this portfolio were created with the greatest care. However, I assume no liability for the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided and the data visualisations. Liability claims arising from the use of this information are excluded unless there is proven intent or gross negligence.
impressumPage.copyrightBody: The content, graphics, and analyses published on this website are protected by copyright. Any reproduction, editing, or use beyond statutory limits requires my prior written consent. For third-party content (e.g. in linked repositories), rights remain with the respective authors.
impressumPage.privacyControllerBody: The person named above in the legal notice is responsible for data processing on this website.
impressumPage.privacyHostingBody: This website is hosted by GitHub Inc. (88 Colin P. Kelly Jr. Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA). When accessing this site, GitHub automatically collects information and stores it in server log files (e.g. IP address, browser type, operating system, date/time of access). This is technically necessary to deliver the website securely and reliably. As GitHub is based in the USA, data may be transferred to the USA.
impressumPage.privacyLocalBody: To protect your privacy, no external services such as Google Fonts or third-party analytics tools are loaded. All fonts and scripts are served directly from my web space on GitHub Pages.
impressumPage.privacyRightsBody: Under the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (revDSG), you have the right to receive information about your stored data free of charge and the right to have your data corrected, blocked, or deleted. For such requests, please contact the email address listed above.
